layers.name: CLI & Orchestration
layers.summary: Launcher/dispatcher + Phase-1 orchestrator, dev server, server lifecycle, incremental planner/merger

classes.name: main
classes.description_zh: Phase 1 提取阶段的总编排入口：遍历项目源码、按扩展名分派到各语言 tree-sitter 提取器、构建依赖图、分配架构分层、评分重要性、生成 hub/flows，并写出确定性的 raw_structure.json、unresolved.json 与 git 元数据/历史侧车文件。
classes.description_en: The top-level orchestrator for Phase 1 extraction: it walks the project, dispatches each source file to its language tree-sitter extractor, builds the dependency graph, assigns layers, scores importance, derives hubs/flows, and writes the deterministic raw_structure.json plus unresolved.json and git metadata/history sidecars.

classes.name: plan
classes.signature: function plan(root, prev, architectureExists, maxChangeRatio = DEFAULT_MAX_CHANGE_RATIO)
classes.description_zh: 增量构建的决策器：以上一次 code-map.json 的 git commit 为锚点，逐项校验前置条件（有锚点、有 architecture.yml、是 git 仓库、改动不过量等），裁定本次走完整重建还是增量重建，并给出明确的 reason。
classes.description_en: The decision engine for incremental builds: anchored on the prior code-map.json's git commit, it checks each precondition (anchor present, architecture.yml exists, is a git repo, change ratio bounded, etc.) to rule full vs. incremental rebuild and report an explicit reason.

classes.name: merge
classes.description_zh: 增量合并的核心纯函数：把上一次 Phase 2 的标注（双语描述、tags、core 标记、分层归属）复用到新生成的 Phase 1 结构上，对未改动声明沿用旧标注、对改动项标记 stale，并将受影响的 flows 标为 needs_review。
classes.description_en: The pure core of incremental merging: it reuses the previous Phase 2 annotations (bilingual descriptions, tags, core flags, layer placement) onto the fresh Phase 1 structure, carrying forward annotations for unchanged decls while flagging changed ones stale and marking affected flows needs_review.

classes.name: mergeMain
classes.description_zh: merge 的 CLI 入口：加载 raw/prev/incremental 三份 JSON、调用纯函数 merge 生成草稿 code-map，写出 draft 文件并汇报需补描述的声明数与待复核的 flow 数。
classes.description_en: The CLI entry point wrapping merge: it loads the raw, prev, and incremental JSON inputs, invokes the pure merge function to produce a draft code-map, writes the draft file, and reports how many declarations need descriptions and how many flows need review.

classes.name: liveServer
classes.description_zh: 服务器存活探测器：读取 server.json 状态文件并通过 pid 信号检测进程是否仍在运行，活着则返回状态、死了则清掉陈旧状态文件——是 run/stop 判定“是否已有服务器在跑”的唯一可信来源。
classes.description_en: The server-liveness probe: it reads the server.json state file and signal-checks the recorded pid, returning the state if alive or clearing the stale file if dead, serving as the single source of truth for whether a server is already running across run/stop.

classes.name: findFreePort
classes.description_zh: 端口选择器：优先尝试请求的端口，被占用时退回让操作系统分配任意空闲端口，确保开发服务器总能绑定成功而不会因端口冲突启动失败。
classes.description_en: The port chooser: it tries the preferred port first and falls back to an OS-assigned free port if that one is taken, ensuring the dev server can always bind without failing on a port conflict.

classes.name: runServer
classes.description_zh: Phase 3 本地开发服务器：用 Node 内置 http 提供 viewer/ 静态资源、每次请求都重新读取 code-map.json（刻意不缓存，使重建后刷新即可见），并在端口绑定瞬间写出 server.json、优雅退出时删除它以支撑服务器生命周期管理。
classes.description_en: The Phase 3 local dev server: it serves the viewer/ assets over Node's built-in http and re-reads code-map.json on every request (deliberately uncached so rebuilds show on refresh), writing server.json the moment the port binds and removing it on graceful shutdown to support server-lifecycle control.

layers.name: Graph & Layout Engine
layers.summary: Language-agnostic core: dependency graph + importance, layer assignment, flow discovery, template detection, and parsing/grammar/yaml/git support

classes.name: buildGraph
classes.description_zh: 流水线的核心建图与重要度引擎：把每个声明的 supertypes/refs 解析成去重且确定顺序的 extends/uses 依赖边，统计出入度，并据此用对数归一化的混合公式打出 _importance 分数，是分层、core/hub 标记与流程发现的图基础。
classes.description_en: The pipeline's core graph-and-importance engine: it resolves each declaration's supertypes/refs into deduplicated, deterministically ordered extends/uses edges, tallies in/out degrees, and blends them into a log-normalized _importance score — the dependency graph on which layering, core/hub marking, and flow discovery all build.

classes.name: resolve
classes.signature: function resolve(raw, byQname, byShort, srcDecl = null)

classes.name: toJsonShape
classes.signature: function toJsonShape(declarations, edges, layers, projectMeta, flows = null)

classes.name: traceFlow
classes.signature: function traceFlow(seed, adjacency, hubIds, maxDepth = 6, ctx = null, maxNodes = Infinity)

classes.name: buildFlows
classes.signature: function buildFlows(seeds, declarations, edges, hubIds, maxDepth = 6, opts = {})

classes.name: buildDispatchFlows
classes.signature: function buildDispatchFlows(declarations, dispatchIndex, edges, hubIds, opts = {})
classes.description_zh: 为每个重要的多态分发接口（责任链/策略/观察者/中间件）生成一条聚焦的确定性「分发流」，以接口的规范分发者为根、深度 2 扇出到所有实现者及其协作者，弥补稠密图中前向 BFS 无法呈现的分发结构供 Phase 2 命名。
classes.description_en: Generates one focused, deterministic dispatch flow per significant polymorphic-dispatch interface (chain-of-responsibility / strategy / observer / middleware), rooted at the interface's canonical dispatcher and fanning out depth-2 to all implementors and their collaborators — capturing the dispatch shape that forward-BFS cannot produce in a dense library, for Phase 2 to name.

classes.name: run
classes.description_zh: gitmeta 模块的底层 git 执行封装：以指定工作目录同步调用 git 命令并捕获结果，任何失败（git 缺失、超时、非仓库）都返回安全值而绝不向流水线抛错，是所有 git 取证函数的防御性基石。
classes.description_en: The defensive low-level git executor underpinning the gitmeta module: it shells out to git in a given working directory and captures the result, returning a safe value on any failure (git missing, timeout, non-repo) so build provenance gathering never throws into the pipeline.

classes.name: isGitRepo
classes.description_zh: 判定目标根目录是否位于 git 工作树内的守卫函数，作为采集分支/提交/历史等 git 元数据前的前置检查，确保非 git 项目能优雅跳过 provenance 标注。
classes.description_en: A guard that determines whether the target root sits inside a git work tree, used as the precondition before gathering branch/commit/history provenance so non-git projects gracefully skip git metadata.

classes.name: commitHistory
classes.description_zh: 为查看器的提交侧栏采集最近提交历史：用单次 git log（自定义分隔符 + --name-only）取出哈希、时间、标题与改动文件清单，任何错误返回 null，是 viewer 提交时间线与「按提交高亮」功能的数据来源。
classes.description_en: Collects the recent commit history that feeds the viewer's commit sidebar — a single git log (custom separators plus --name-only) yielding each commit's hash, time, subject, and changed-file list, returning null on any error; the data source behind the viewer's commit timeline and per-commit highlighting.

classes.name: resolveGrammarWasm
classes.description_zh: 把语言名解析为其 tree-sitter WASM 语法文件的绝对路径：捆绑语法直接走仓库路径，6 个大型远程语法在首次使用时按 manifest 中的 sha256 下载校验并缓存，离线且未缓存时抛 GrammarUnavailable 让该语言文件转入 unresolved 而非崩溃。
classes.description_en: Resolves a language name to the absolute path of its tree-sitter WASM grammar — bundled grammars from the repo, the six large remote ones fetched-once, sha256-verified against the manifest, and cached on first use — throwing GrammarUnavailable when offline-and-uncached so that language's files route to unresolved instead of crashing the pipeline.

classes.name: loadConfig
classes.description_zh: 分层配置的三层优先级解析器：优先用 Phase 0 的 architecture.yml，其次用模板信号检测的胜出模板，最后回退内置 clean-architecture；无论走哪条路径都先运行检测器并始终返回带 reason 的检测字典（never null），供 Phase 2 判断架构是否已被人工核实。
classes.description_en: The three-tier resolver for the layer configuration — preferring Phase 0's architecture.yml, then the signal-detected winning template, then embedded clean-architecture — that always runs the detector and returns a detection dict carrying a reason (never null), letting Phase 2 tell whether the architecture is AI-verified or merely auto-detected.

classes.name: globTopTwoLevels
classes.description_zh: 模板检测的浅层 glob 辅助：在项目根及其直接子目录两级范围内匹配文件/路径模式（跳过 skip 目录），为信号检测的文件证据匹配与 manifest 文件发现提供有界、确定的扫描范围。
classes.description_en: A shallow glob helper for template detection that matches file/path patterns across the project root and its immediate child directories (skipping skip-dirs), giving signal detection's file-evidence matching and manifest discovery a bounded, deterministic search scope.

classes.name: readManifests
classes.description_zh: 汇总并读取项目的所有构建清单（package.json、go.mod、Cargo.toml、pom.xml、*.csproj 等）为一段合并文本，供模板检测据此对依赖签名打分以推断架构风格。
classes.description_en: Gathers and concatenates the project's build manifests (package.json, go.mod, Cargo.toml, pom.xml, *.csproj, etc.) into one blob of text that template detection scans for dependency signals when inferring the architectural style.

classes.name: detectTemplate
classes.description_zh: Phase 1 的架构模板检测器：对每个 templates/*.yml 模板按文件、清单依赖与目录路径三类信号加权打分，并附带可审计的 evidence，选出最契合的架构形状作为分层桶的默认来源（Phase 2 可接受或替换）。
classes.description_en: Phase 1's architecture-template detector: it signal-scores each templates/*.yml against file, manifest-dependency, and directory-path evidence (recording an auditable evidence trail), and picks the best-fitting architectural shape as the default source of layer buckets, which Phase 2 may accept or swap.

classes.name: init
classes.description_zh: web-tree-sitter 运行时的一次性初始化封装：以缓存的 promise 单次启动 vendored 0.25.10 解析器运行时（通过 locateFile 定位 WASM），是所有语言解析前必须等待的引导步骤。
classes.description_en: The one-time initializer for the web-tree-sitter runtime: it boots the vendored 0.25.10 parser runtime exactly once via a cached promise (locating the WASM through locateFile), the bootstrap every language parse must await.

classes.name: loadLanguage
classes.description_zh: 按 manifest 名称懒加载并缓存一个 tree-sitter 语法 Language 对象：仅在首次解析某语言时解析其 WASM 路径、读取字节并加载，体现「语法按需加载、缺失则该语言不可用而非崩溃」的不变式。
classes.description_en: Lazily loads and caches a tree-sitter grammar Language by manifest name — resolving the WASM path, reading its bytes, and loading it only on first parse of that language — embodying the invariant that grammars load on demand and a missing one merely makes that language unavailable rather than crashing.

classes.name: makeQuery
classes.description_zh: 用一段查询源对给定语法编译出 tree-sitter Query 对象的薄封装，是各语言提取器从 AST 中匹配声明、引用等节点的查询入口。
classes.description_en: A thin wrapper that compiles a tree-sitter Query against a given grammar from query source — the entry point each language extractor uses to match declarations, references, and other nodes in the AST.

classes.name: parseBlock
classes.description_zh: 极简 YAML 子集解析器的块级分派器：根据首行判断当前缩进块是序列还是映射并转交相应解析函数，是读取 templates/*.yml 与 architecture.yml 的递归下降核心。
classes.description_en: The block-level dispatcher of the minimal YAML-subset parser: it inspects the first line to decide whether an indented block is a sequence or a mapping and delegates accordingly — the recursive-descent core for reading templates/*.yml and architecture.yml.

classes.name: parseSequence
classes.description_zh: 迷你 YAML 解析器中解析块序列（- item）的函数，支持嵌套块、内联流集合与内联映射项，用于读取模板里的 path_segments、name_suffixes、signals 等列表结构。
classes.description_en: The mini-YAML parser's block-sequence (- item) handler, supporting nested blocks, inline flow collections, and inline map items — used to read the list structures (path_segments, name_suffixes, signals) inside templates.

classes.name: parseMapping
classes.description_zh: 迷你 YAML 解析器中解析块映射（key: value 与 key:\n  嵌套）的函数，处理同缩进及更深缩进的嵌套块/序列，是把模板与 architecture 文件读成 layer 配置对象的关键。
classes.description_en: The mini-YAML parser's block-mapping handler (key: value and key:\n  nested), resolving nested blocks and sequences at equal or deeper indentation — central to reading template and architecture files into the layer-configuration objects.

classes.name: parseScalar
classes.description_zh: 迷你 YAML 解析器的标量识别器：把一个标量分派为流序列/流映射，或解析为带引号字符串、整数、浮点、布尔、null 与裸字符串，确保模板/架构值被读成正确的 JS 类型。
classes.description_en: The mini-YAML parser's scalar recognizer: it dispatches a scalar to a flow sequence/map or parses it as a quoted string, integer, float, boolean, null, or bare string — ensuring template/architecture values are read into the correct JS types.

classes.name: parseFlowMap
classes.description_zh: 迷你 YAML 解析器中解析内联流映射 {k: v, k2: v2} 的函数，按顶层逗号切分并递归解析每个键值，用于读取模板中以单行书写的映射型信号或元数据。
classes.description_en: The mini-YAML parser's inline flow-map ({k: v, k2: v2}) handler, splitting on top-level commas and recursively parsing each key/value — used to read single-line map-style signals or metadata in templates.

layers.name: Language Extractors
layers.summary: Per-language web-tree-sitter extractors that turn source into the shared Declaration shape

classes.name: textOf
classes.description_zh: 所有提取器共用的小工具，返回已正确解码的 tree-sitter 节点文本，是从 AST 安全取出标识符/源码片段的统一入口。
classes.description_en: Shared extractor helper returning a tree-sitter node's correctly-decoded text, the single safe way every language extractor lifts identifiers and source snippets out of the AST.

classes.name: tailName
classes.description_zh: 从可能带点号的引用节点（如 a.b.c、obj.method）中取出末尾的短名，使各语言能把调用/成员访问归一化为可被图解析器按短名解析的被调名。
classes.description_en: Extracts the trailing short name from a possibly-dotted reference node (a.b.c, obj.method) so every extractor can normalize calls and member accesses into a short callee name the graph resolver can match.

classes.name: hasErrorIn
classes.description_zh: 递归判断子树是否含 ERROR/MISSING 节点，是"宁可漏报不可误报"原则的执行者——解析不干净的声明据此降级或进 unresolved，绝不混入图。
classes.description_en: Recursively detects ERROR/MISSING nodes in a subtree, enforcing the pipeline's 'miss rather than misidentify' rule so anything tree-sitter couldn't parse cleanly is downgraded or sent to unresolved instead of polluting the graph.

classes.name: locOf
classes.description_zh: 计算节点跨越的代码行数，为每个声明提供 loc 度量，供下游重要性评分与体量展示使用。
classes.description_en: Computes the lines of code a node spans, supplying the per-declaration loc metric used downstream for importance scoring and size display.

classes.name: signatureOf
classes.description_zh: 提取函数从头部到函数体之前的签名文本并折叠空白，为声明生成可读的签名字段，供详情面板和深链展示。
classes.description_en: Extracts a function's header text up to its body with whitespace collapsed, producing the human-readable signature field shown in the viewer's detail panel and deep-links.

classes.name: countMethods
classes.description_zh: 统计类体内直接定义的方法数量，为类型声明提供 method_count 摘要，让单个节点能表征其内部复杂度而无需展开成员。
classes.description_en: Counts method definitions directly inside a class body, supplying the method_count summary that lets a single type node convey its internal complexity without exploding its members into the graph.

classes.name: Declaration
classes.description_zh: 定义贯穿整条流水线的核心数据契约 Declaration（name/namespace/kind/refs/supertypes/visibility 等），是所有语言提取器的统一输出形状，也是语言无关的图与布局引擎唯一识别的结构。
classes.description_en: Defines the pipeline's central data contract — the Declaration shape (name/namespace/kind/refs/supertypes/visibility/…) — the uniform output every language extractor produces and the only structure the language-agnostic graph and layout engine ever operates on.

classes.name: qualifiedName
classes.description_zh: 由 namespace 与 name 组合出声明的全限定名，是边解析、重要性平局打破与跨文件去重所依赖的规范标识。
classes.description_en: Composes a declaration's fully-qualified name from its namespace and name, the canonical identifier edge resolution, importance tie-breaking, and cross-file dedup all key on.

classes.name: ImportSpec
classes.signature: function ImportSpec(raw, qualified = null, alias = null)
classes.description_zh: 描述一条 import 记录（raw/qualified/alias）的工厂，统一各语言对导入语句的表示，供未解析依赖的归并与展示使用。
classes.description_en: Factory for the ImportSpec record (raw/qualified/alias) that uniformly represents an import across languages, feeding dependency tracking and unresolved-reference handling.

classes.name: ParseResult
classes.description_zh: 定义提取器单文件返回的封装契约（declarations/imports/skipped），明确每个提取器必须交付的三类产物——尤其 skipped 把无法干净解析的内容转交 Phase 2 处理。
classes.description_en: Defines the per-file return contract (declarations/imports/skipped) every extractor must deliver, with the skipped bucket routing anything not cleanly parsed to Phase 2 for recovery.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: C 语言提取器入口：解析 .c/.h，把 struct/union/enum、typedef 与自由函数提炼为声明，由文件路径推导命名空间，并按 static 链接性标记可见性以辅助同名消歧。
classes.description_en: C extractor entry point: parses .c/.h into struct/union/enum, typedef and free-function declarations, derives namespace from the file path, and marks static functions private to help the resolver disambiguate same-name collisions.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: C++ 提取器入口：穿透 namespace/template/extern "C" 包装收集类、结构体、联合、枚举与自由函数，记录继承的 supertypes 与 method_count，跳过类内成员以保持节点为架构级。
classes.description_en: C++ extractor entry point: descends through namespace/template/extern-"C" wrappers to collect classes, structs, unions, enums and free functions with inheritance supertypes and method_count, skipping in-class members to keep nodes architectural.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: C# 提取器入口：下钻块作用域与文件作用域命名空间，把 class/interface/struct/enum/record（含嵌套类型）连同基类列表与方法计数提炼为声明。
classes.description_en: C# extractor entry point: descends both block-scoped and file-scoped namespaces to extract classes/interfaces/structs/enums/records (including nested types) with their base lists and method counts as declarations.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: Dart 提取器入口：在松散语法下提炼 class/mixin/enum/extension 与顶层函数（函数体为相邻兄弟节点需折叠），调用边采用紧邻 arguments 的标识符做尽力而为的识别。
classes.description_en: Dart extractor entry point: against a loose grammar it extracts class/mixin/enum/extension and top-level functions (folding the function body that sits as a separate sibling), deriving best-effort call edges from the identifier preceding an arguments node.

classes.name: ensure
classes.description_zh: Go 提取器的惰性初始化器，首次解析时加载 Go 语法并编译包/导入/声明三组 tree-sitter 查询，使语法 WASM 只在确有 .go 文件时才载入。
classes.description_en: Lazy initializer for the Go extractor that loads the Go grammar and compiles its package/import/declaration tree-sitter queries on first parse, ensuring the WASM grammar is loaded only when .go files are actually present.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: Go 提取器入口：把类型（struct/interface）、自由函数与方法提炼为声明，命名空间由目录加 package 名合成，并把方法按 receiver 归并到所属类型上。
classes.description_en: Go extractor entry point: extracts types (struct/interface), free functions and methods as declarations, composing namespace from directory plus package name and attributing methods back to their receiver type.

classes.name: ensure
classes.description_zh: Java 提取器的惰性初始化器，加载 Java 语法并编译 package/import/声明的 tree-sitter 查询，仅在遇到 .java 文件时触发。
classes.description_en: Lazy initializer for the Java extractor that loads the Java grammar and compiles its package/import/declaration tree-sitter queries, triggered only when .java files are encountered.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: Java 提取器入口：基于 tree-sitter 查询把 class/interface/record/enum 连同其 package 命名空间、继承/接口 supertypes 与方法计数提炼为声明。
classes.description_en: Java extractor entry point: query-drives extraction of class/interface/record/enum declarations with their package namespace, superclass/interface supertypes and method counts.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: Kotlin 提取器入口（适配 fwcd 语法方言）：提炼 class/object/interface（区分 data/sealed/enum）与其委托 supertypes，并仅收录命名以表现层后缀结尾的 @Composable 顶层函数，使 Compose 屏幕成为可见的架构节点。
classes.description_en: Kotlin extractor entry point (adapted to the fwcd grammar dialect): extracts class/object/interface declarations (distinguishing data/sealed/enum) with delegation supertypes, and surfaces only presentation-suffixed @Composable top-level functions so Compose screens become visible architectural nodes.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: Lua 提取器入口：由于 Lua 无类，把自由函数、表函数与方法式函数提炼为声明（剥离表/接收者前缀只留短名），命名空间取自文件路径，并从 require 调用提取模块依赖。
classes.description_en: Lua extractor entry point: since Lua has no classes it extracts free, table and method-style functions as declarations (stripping the table/receiver prefix to the short name), derives namespace from the file path, and surfaces module deps from require calls.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: Objective-C 提取器入口：把 @interface/@implementation/@protocol 提炼为声明（名字读首个 identifier），记录超类与采纳的协议作为 supertypes，调用边来自实现体中的消息表达式。
classes.description_en: Objective-C extractor entry point: extracts @interface/@implementation/@protocol as declarations (reading the first identifier as the name), records superclass and adopted protocols as supertypes, and derives call edges from message expressions in the implementation.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: Python 提取器入口：基于查询提炼模块级 class/function（含被装饰定义），由文件路径推导命名空间，从基类参数表取 supertypes，从调用表达式取 refs。
classes.description_en: Python extractor entry point: query-drives extraction of module-level classes and functions (including decorated definitions), derives namespace from the file path, and pulls supertypes from base-class argument lists and refs from call expressions.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: Rust 提取器入口：把 struct/enum/trait/function/mod 提炼为声明，命名空间由文件位置推导的 mod 路径而来，trait 边界作为 supertypes，调用与宏调用作为 refs。
classes.description_en: Rust extractor entry point: extracts struct/enum/trait/function/mod as declarations with namespace derived from the file's mod path, capturing trait bounds as supertypes and calls plus macro invocations as refs.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: Swift 提取器入口：把以关键字区分的 class/struct/enum/actor、protocol、extension 与顶层函数提炼为声明，命名空间取自文件路径，并把 extension 折叠进同文件的同名类型以避免节点碰撞。
classes.description_en: Swift extractor entry point: extracts keyword-distinguished class/struct/enum/actor, protocols, extensions and top-level functions as declarations with file-path namespaces, folding extensions into their same-file type to avoid colliding nodes.

classes.name: parse
classes.description_zh: TypeScript/JavaScript 提取器入口：用一套提取器覆盖 .ts/.tsx/.js/.jsx，按扩展名选 typescript 或 tsx 语法，把 class/interface/function/type_alias/enum（含导出包装）提炼为声明并解析继承与调用边。
classes.description_en: TypeScript/JavaScript extractor entry point: one extractor covering .ts/.tsx/.js/.jsx, picking the typescript or tsx grammar by extension to extract class/interface/function/type_alias/enum (including export-wrapped) declarations with their heritage and call edges.

layers.name: Viewer · Data
layers.summary: Client-side model load/normalize, schema, index builders, flow synthesis, git history, and data-source resolution

classes.name: buildFlowIndex
classes.description_zh: 构建 flow 模式所需的 id→flow 索引：优先使用模型自带的 flows[],缺失时基于类索引与出边邻接表在客户端合成 flows,并解析出默认选中的 flow（保留仍有效的 activeFlow,否则回退到首个 flow）。
classes.description_en: Builds the id→flow index that drives the viewer's flow mode, preferring the model's own flows[] and synthesizing them client-side from the class index and outgoing-edge adjacency when absent, while resolving the default selected flow (keeping a still-valid activeFlow, else the first).

classes.name: load
classes.description_zh: 视图层的数据加载入口:以 no-store 方式抓取（多项目画廊时按 slug 解析的）code-map.json,使重建后刷新即可生效,并将结果分发给 onModel/onError,把规范化、建索引与渲染留给调用方。
classes.description_en: The viewer's data-loading entry point that fetches code-map.json with no-store caching (URL resolved per-project for the multi-project gallery) so a rebuild shows on refresh, then dispatches the parsed model to onModel/onError while leaving normalization, indexing, and rendering to the caller.

layers.name: Viewer · Layout & Render
layers.summary: Layered and flow layout plus the SVG scene / node / edge renderers

classes.name: makeLayout
classes.description_zh: 层布局几何的唯一来源：在给定字体缩放下从冻结的 LAYOUT_BASE 派生出一个全新的、随字号变化的布局常量对象，取代旧版就地修改全局 LAYOUT 的做法，供所有渲染器读取尺寸与间距。
classes.description_en: The single source of layout geometry: from a given font scale it derives a fresh, font-scaled layout-constant object off the frozen LAYOUT_BASE (replacing the old in-place mutation of a global LAYOUT), which every renderer reads for sizes and spacing.

classes.name: nodeWidth
classes.description_zh: 依据声明名称长度计算节点框宽度并钳制在 [minNodeW, maxNodeW] 区间，为层布局与流布局提供统一、确定的节点尺寸度量。
classes.description_en: Computes a node box's width from its declaration name length, clamped to [minNodeW, maxNodeW], giving both the layer and flow layouts one consistent, deterministic node-sizing metric.

classes.name: flowEdgeClass
classes.signature: function flowEdgeClass(kind, { active = false, dimmed = false } = {})

classes.name: langColor
classes.description_zh: 将语言名映射到对应的 CSS 颜色变量（未知语言回退到 --lang-default），用于节点左侧语言色条的着色。
classes.description_en: Maps a language name to its CSS color variable (unknown languages fall back to --lang-default), used to color the per-node language stripe.

classes.name: makeNodeEl
classes.description_zh: 唯一的 SVG 节点构建器：为一个已定位节点生成 <g class="node">（矩形、语言色条、截断标签并接线事件），通过 ctx 注入装饰/注册/事件钩子以保持无全局副作用，被层带与流两个渲染器共用。
classes.description_en: The single SVG node builder: produces a <g class="node"> (rect, language stripe, truncated label, wired listeners) for one positioned node, taking decoration/registration/event hooks via ctx to stay free of global side-effects, and is shared by both the layer-band and flow renderers.

classes.name: appendNode
classes.signature: function appendNode(st, group, n, ctx, decorateNode)

classes.name: renderApp
classes.description_zh: 视图渲染的顶层入口与 store 订阅者：根据当前激活视图从视图注册表中选出对应的 ViewDef（默认回退到 layer），交给共享的 renderScene 生命周期执行，是 viewer 多视图机制（层带 / 流 DAG）的总调度点。
classes.description_en: The top-level render entry and store subscriber: looks up the active view's ViewDef from the view registry (falling back to 'layer') and hands it to the shared renderScene lifecycle, serving as the dispatch point for the viewer's multi-view mechanism (layer bands / flow DAG).

layers.name: Viewer · Interaction & UI
layers.summary: Zoom/pan/selection/keyboard interactions and the detail, tooltip, controls, build-info and language-stats panels

classes.name: formatBuildInfo
classes.description_zh: 纯函数式格式化器，将 model.project 的构建时间与 git 元数据（分支/短哈希/dirty 标记）转换为顶栏构建徽章的标签文本、多行提示信息和隐藏标志，无 DOM 副作用以便在 Node 下独立测试。
classes.description_en: A DOM-free, pure formatter that turns model.project's build timestamp and git metadata (branch/short-hash/dirty flag) into the topbar build-info badge's label text, multi-line tooltip, and hidden flag, deliberately side-effect-free so it can be unit-tested under Node.

classes.name: closeCommitSidebar
classes.description_zh: 将提交历史侧栏收起回边缘标签并清空其选中提交与节点高亮状态（不触发重渲染），由节点点击或折叠按钮等调用方决定何时重绘场景。
classes.description_en: Collapses the commit-history sidebar back to its edge tab and clears its selected-commit and node-highlight state without re-rendering, leaving the redraw decision to its callers (node-click vs. the collapse button).

classes.name: populateCommitList
classes.description_zh: 依据 state.gitHistory 重建提交历史侧栏列表，标记当前选中提交、为每条提交解析其改动文件映射到的节点并显示加载/空/无匹配等状态，是 git 提交与图节点高亮联动的 UI 入口。
classes.description_en: Rebuilds the commit-history sidebar list from state.gitHistory, marking the active commit, resolving each commit's changed-file-to-node mapping, and reflecting loading/empty/no-match states, serving as the UI bridge between git commits and node highlighting.

classes.name: initControls
classes.description_zh: 顶栏与侧栏交互的统一接线点，绑定 core/all 视图、layer/flow 分组、主题、字号、语言切换以及 flow 侧栏和提交历史侧栏的事件，结构性变更经 setState 触发 renderApp 重渲染并通过 createSettings 持久化各项设置。
classes.description_en: The single wiring point for the viewer's chrome interactions, binding the core/all view, layer/flow grouping, theme, font-size, and language toggles plus the flow and commit-history sidebars, routing structural changes through setState (→ the renderApp re-render) and persisting each setting via createSettings.

classes.name: renderLangStats
classes.description_zh: 聚合所有层中各声明的语言并按数量降序统计，将每种语言的声明计数以带语言色标的条目渲染到详情面板底部，向用户概览项目的多语言构成。
classes.description_en: Aggregates per-language declaration counts across all layers, sorts them descending, and renders each language's count with its language-color swatch into the detail-panel footer, giving the user an at-a-glance overview of the project's multi-language composition.

layers.name: Viewer · Shell
layers.summary: App bootstrap, state store, settings persistence, i18n, shared utilities, and PNG export

classes.name: t
classes.description_zh: viewer 的 i18n 字符串查找入口，按语言代码从 I18N 字典取出 UI 文案，缺键时回退到英文再回退到键名本身，让界面在中英文之间无破损切换。
classes.description_en: The viewer's i18n lookup entry point that resolves a UI string from the I18N dictionary by language code, falling back to English and then to the key itself, so the interface can switch between Chinese and English without breakage.

classes.name: onModel
classes.description_zh: viewer 加载成功后的模型装配回调：将原始 JSON 规范化为模型，写入 store，建立边/类/流程索引并填充项目名、构建信息、语言统计与 git 提交映射，最后触发首次渲染，是数据进入界面的总装配点。
classes.description_en: The viewer's post-load model-assembly callback that normalizes the raw JSON into the model, writes it into the store, builds the edge/class/flow indexes, populates project name, build info, language stats and git node mapping, then triggers the first render — the single point where loaded data is wired into the UI.

classes.name: setState
classes.description_zh: viewer 单一状态源的唯一变更入口，把补丁合并进全局 state 并调度一次 requestAnimationFrame 合并的重渲染通知，是整个客户端响应式更新的中枢。
classes.description_en: The sole mutation entry point for the viewer's single source of state, merging a patch into the global state and scheduling one rAF-coalesced re-render notification — the hub of the client's reactive update cycle.

classes.name: escapeHtml
classes.description_zh: viewer 的 HTML 转义工具，把任意值（含 null）安全转义后再插入 DOM 文本，是详情面板、错误提示等动态拼接 HTML 处防注入的基础保护。
classes.description_en: The viewer's HTML-escaping utility that safely escapes any value (including null) before interpolation into DOM text, the baseline injection guard wherever the detail panel, error states and other dynamic HTML are assembled.

classes.name: makeExporter
classes.description_zh: PNG 导出器工厂，返回一个把整张地图 SVG 克隆并内联计算样式后、按 2 倍分辨率带留白栅格化为 PNG 并保存的函数，实现所见即所得（含选中高亮与边）的全架构图导出。
classes.description_en: The factory for the PNG exporter, returning a function that clones the full map SVG with inlined computed styles and rasterizes it at 2x with padding into a saved PNG, delivering WYSIWYG export of the entire architecture diagram including selection highlight and edges.

flows.name: 代码地图构建管线 · Code Map Build Pipeline
flows.description: Phase-1 主编排：遍历项目、按语言抽取声明、构建依赖图与重要度、套用架构分层、发现派发与业务流并附加 Git 元数据，最终产出 raw_structure.json。 · The Phase-1 orchestrator that walks the project, extracts declarations per language, builds the dependency graph and importance, applies architectural layers, discovers dispatch and flows, attaches Git metadata, and emits raw_structure.json.
flows.description_zh: Phase-1 主编排：遍历项目、按语言抽取声明、构建依赖图与重要度、套用架构分层、发现派发与业务流并附加 Git 元数据，最终产出 raw_structure.json。
flows.description_en: The Phase-1 orchestrator that walks the project, extracts declarations per language, builds the dependency graph and importance, applies architectural layers, discovers dispatch and flows, attaches Git metadata, and emits raw_structure.json.

flows.name: 视图渲染调度 · View Render Dispatch
flows.description: 浏览器查看器的渲染入口：根据当前激活视图（分层或业务流）选取渲染器并把场景绘制到 SVG 画布。 · The viewer's render entry point that selects the active view (layer or flow) and draws the corresponding scene onto the SVG canvas.
flows.description_zh: 浏览器查看器的渲染入口：根据当前激活视图（分层或业务流）选取渲染器并把场景绘制到 SVG 画布。
flows.description_en: The viewer's render entry point that selects the active view (layer or flow) and draws the corresponding scene onto the SVG canvas.

flows.name: Rust 源码抽取 · Rust Source Extraction
flows.description: 用 web-tree-sitter 解析 Rust 源码，识别 trait/impl/函数并解析其方法、超类型与引用，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。 · Parses Rust source with web-tree-sitter, recognizing traits, impls and functions plus their methods, supertypes and refs, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.
flows.description_zh: 用 web-tree-sitter 解析 Rust 源码，识别 trait/impl/函数并解析其方法、超类型与引用，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。
flows.description_en: Parses Rust source with web-tree-sitter, recognizing traits, impls and functions plus their methods, supertypes and refs, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.

flows.name: C++ 源码抽取 · C++ Source Extraction
flows.description: 用 web-tree-sitter 解析 C++ 源码，提取类/方法/函数声明、继承的超类型与方法体引用，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。 · Parses C++ source with web-tree-sitter, extracting class/method/function declarations, inherited supertypes and body refs, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.
flows.description_zh: 用 web-tree-sitter 解析 C++ 源码，提取类/方法/函数声明、继承的超类型与方法体引用，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。
flows.description_en: Parses C++ source with web-tree-sitter, extracting class/method/function declarations, inherited supertypes and body refs, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.

flows.name: Python 源码抽取 · Python Source Extraction
flows.description: 用 web-tree-sitter 解析 Python 源码，识别类与（嵌套）函数、基类超类型及调用引用，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。 · Parses Python source with web-tree-sitter, recognizing classes and (nested) functions, base-class supertypes and call refs, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.
flows.description_zh: 用 web-tree-sitter 解析 Python 源码，识别类与（嵌套）函数、基类超类型及调用引用，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。
flows.description_en: Parses Python source with web-tree-sitter, recognizing classes and (nested) functions, base-class supertypes and call refs, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.

flows.name: TypeScript 源码抽取 · TypeScript Source Extraction
flows.description: 用 web-tree-sitter 解析 TypeScript/JavaScript 源码，提取类、（嵌套）函数、extends/implements 超类型与引用，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。 · Parses TypeScript/JavaScript source with web-tree-sitter, extracting classes, (nested) functions, extends/implements supertypes and refs, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.
flows.description_zh: 用 web-tree-sitter 解析 TypeScript/JavaScript 源码，提取类、（嵌套）函数、extends/implements 超类型与引用，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。
flows.description_en: Parses TypeScript/JavaScript source with web-tree-sitter, extracting classes, (nested) functions, extends/implements supertypes and refs, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.

flows.name: C 源码抽取 · C Source Extraction
flows.description: 用 web-tree-sitter 解析 C 源码，提取函数声明、声明符名与方法体引用，并按 static 标记可见性，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。 · Parses C source with web-tree-sitter, extracting function declarations, declarator names and body refs, marking visibility from static, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.
flows.description_zh: 用 web-tree-sitter 解析 C 源码，提取函数声明、声明符名与方法体引用，并按 static 标记可见性，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。
flows.description_en: Parses C source with web-tree-sitter, extracting function declarations, declarator names and body refs, marking visibility from static, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.

flows.name: Go 源码抽取 · Go Source Extraction
flows.description: 用 web-tree-sitter 解析 Go 源码，提取类型/接口/函数、接收者方法与接口超类型，并解析方法体引用，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。 · Parses Go source with web-tree-sitter, extracting types, interfaces and functions, receiver methods and interface supertypes plus body refs, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.
flows.description_zh: 用 web-tree-sitter 解析 Go 源码，提取类型/接口/函数、接收者方法与接口超类型，并解析方法体引用，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。
flows.description_en: Parses Go source with web-tree-sitter, extracting types, interfaces and functions, receiver methods and interface supertypes plus body refs, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.

flows.name: Kotlin 源码抽取 · Kotlin Source Extraction
flows.description: 用 web-tree-sitter 解析 Kotlin 源码，提取类/函数、超类型与引用，并识别 @Composable 注解，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。 · Parses Kotlin source with web-tree-sitter, extracting classes and functions, supertypes and refs, and detecting @Composable annotations, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.
flows.description_zh: 用 web-tree-sitter 解析 Kotlin 源码，提取类/函数、超类型与引用，并识别 @Composable 注解，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。
flows.description_en: Parses Kotlin source with web-tree-sitter, extracting classes and functions, supertypes and refs, and detecting @Composable annotations, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.

flows.name: Swift 源码抽取 · Swift Source Extraction
flows.description: 用 web-tree-sitter 解析 Swift 源码，提取类/结构体/协议、方法与遵循的超类型及方法体引用，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。 · Parses Swift source with web-tree-sitter, extracting classes, structs and protocols, methods and conformed supertypes plus body refs, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.
flows.description_zh: 用 web-tree-sitter 解析 Swift 源码，提取类/结构体/协议、方法与遵循的超类型及方法体引用，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。
flows.description_en: Parses Swift source with web-tree-sitter, extracting classes, structs and protocols, methods and conformed supertypes plus body refs, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.

flows.name: Dart 源码抽取 · Dart Source Extraction
flows.description: 用 web-tree-sitter（首次按需加载语法）解析 Dart 源码，提取类与方法、超类型及引用，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。 · Parses Dart source with web-tree-sitter (lazily loading the grammar on first use), extracting classes and methods, supertypes and refs, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.
flows.description_zh: 用 web-tree-sitter（首次按需加载语法）解析 Dart 源码，提取类与方法、超类型及引用，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。
flows.description_en: Parses Dart source with web-tree-sitter (lazily loading the grammar on first use), extracting classes and methods, supertypes and refs, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.

flows.name: Java 源码抽取 · Java Source Extraction
flows.description: 用 web-tree-sitter（按需加载语法并编译查询）解析 Java 源码，提取类/方法、extends/implements 超类型与引用，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。 · Parses Java source with web-tree-sitter (lazily loading the grammar and compiling queries), extracting classes and methods, extends/implements supertypes and refs, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.
flows.description_zh: 用 web-tree-sitter（按需加载语法并编译查询）解析 Java 源码，提取类/方法、extends/implements 超类型与引用，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。
flows.description_en: Parses Java source with web-tree-sitter (lazily loading the grammar and compiling queries), extracting classes and methods, extends/implements supertypes and refs, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.

flows.name: Lua 源码抽取 · Lua Source Extraction
flows.description: 用 web-tree-sitter（首次按需加载语法）解析 Lua 源码，提取函数声明与方法体引用，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。 · Parses Lua source with web-tree-sitter (lazily loading the grammar on first use), extracting function declarations and body refs, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.
flows.description_zh: 用 web-tree-sitter（首次按需加载语法）解析 Lua 源码，提取函数声明与方法体引用，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。
flows.description_en: Parses Lua source with web-tree-sitter (lazily loading the grammar on first use), extracting function declarations and body refs, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.

flows.name: Objective-C 源码抽取 · Objective-C Source Extraction
flows.description: 用 web-tree-sitter（首次按需加载语法）解析 Objective-C 源码，提取类/方法与选择器名、超类型及引用，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。 · Parses Objective-C source with web-tree-sitter (lazily loading the grammar on first use), extracting classes and methods with selector names, supertypes and refs, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.
flows.description_zh: 用 web-tree-sitter（首次按需加载语法）解析 Objective-C 源码，提取类/方法与选择器名、超类型及引用，归一化为共享 Declaration 结构。
flows.description_en: Parses Objective-C source with web-tree-sitter (lazily loading the grammar on first use), extracting classes and methods with selector names, supertypes and refs, normalized into the shared Declaration shape.
